creator: raul.munoz@custos.es
text:
Changelog (https://docs.mattermost.com/administration/changelog.html)

[....]
Fixing an issue where messages may be missing after reconnecting the network. MM-16423
Fixing an issue where the client may sometimes crash while viewing a direct message channel. MM-16480
Fixing an issue where Net Promoter Score (NPS) prints an error message in server logs when Error and Diagnostics Reporting is disabled. MM-16465
Fixing an issue where Net Promoter Score (NPS) telemetry reporting surveys are disabled if the setting has not been modified. MM-16554
[....]

MM-16480 happens often here.
Thanks in advance.
